issue.title: refactor(py): replace deprecated pkg_resources in redshift.py
issue.body:
## Context
CLAUDE.md: keep Python deprecation-free.

## Target
- File: `superset/db_engine_specs/redshift.py`
- Scope: this file only

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `grep -r "pkg_resources" superset/db_engine_specs/redshift.py` returns 0 hits
- [ ] `pytest tests/unit_tests/db_engine_specs/test_redshift.py` passes
